push.description: Commit all changes and push to remote using GITHUB_TOKEN

voice_google.description: Voice input: records 10s audio, transcribes with Google Speech API, copies text to clipboard

analyze.description: Run full project analysis — spec, user stories, plugins, MCP, skills, readiness, phases, agents, models

BackendAgent.description: Backend .NET developer. Creates entities, EF Core migrations, services, controllers, DTOs, mappers, validators, Swagger docs. Uses skills: dotnet-entity, dotnet-endpoint, result-pattern, fluent-validation, swagger-docs, aspnet-core. Runs: dotnet build.

FrontendAgent.description: Frontend Next.js developer. Creates pages, components, API integration, Tailwind CSS v4, shadcn/ui, Lucide icons. Uses skills: nextjs-page, design-system, layers-orient, layers-user-needs, layers-conceptual-model, layers-interaction-flow, layers-surface, refactor-ui. Runs: npm run dev.

TesterAgent.description: Test engineer. Creates xUnit unit tests (Moq + Bogus), integration tests (WebApplicationFactory), Playwright E2E tests. Uses skills: dotnet-test, test-driven-development, systematic-debugging, playwright, playwright-interactive. Runs: dotnet test, npx playwright test.

AnalystAgent.description: Technical analyst. Creates PlantUML diagrams (ER, Class, Sequence, UseCase, Deployment), tech documentation, security threat models. Uses skills: plantuml-docs, security-threat-model.

DevOpsAgent.description: DevOps engineer. Creates Dockerfiles, docker-compose, nginx config, GitHub Actions CI/CD, VPS deploy, Sentry monitoring. Uses skills: cicd-pipeline, docker-compose-dev, vps-deploy, gh-fix-ci, sentry. Runs: docker compose build.
